chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D- 2805 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on Misc. No.12089/2021 (Urgency). 2. For order on Misc. No.12090/2021 (Exemption). 3. For order on Misc. No.12091/2021 (Stay). 4. For hearing of main case. 23.4.2021 Mr. Muhammad Haseeb Jamali, advocate for the petitioners. ----------------------------------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. It is contended, inter alia, on behalf of the petitioner that the petitioner is engaged in the medical profession for almost thirty three years and seven months. He also worked abroad and in Pakistan at senior positions and at present the petitioner is employed as a professor of surgery since last four years and seven months in BPS-21 in respondent No.1 University. The petitioner, through this petition has impugned the notification dated 12.04.2021 issued by respondent No.1, whereby he has been non-suited despite the fact that he is senior most officer and his name appears much above than the other candidates, who have been erroneously recommended for the position of Meritorious Professor BPS-22 in violation of law and constitution. He, therefore, prayed for notice. Let notice be issued to the respondents, learned DAG as well as to learned Advocate General, Sindh for 04.05.2021 with direction to file comments before the next date of hearing. J U D G E J U D G E Zahid/*
